engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: This drawing shows motor torque-speed characteristics for intermittent and continuous operating modes. Intermittent mode shows maximum torque of 24 N.m and rated torque of 21.5 N.m. Continuous mode shows rated torques of 7.16 N.m and 4.77 N.m at different speed points. The curves show torque decreasing with increasing speed from 0 to 4000 rpm.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
